aboutParagraphs: Hey, I’m Sanskar. I build things across the web and CLI, mostly keeping them minimal and practical. Currently learning, shipping, and figuring things out as I go.

bullets: 1,200+ users · AI assistant at 96% accuracy on Solana/Rust/Anchor queries
RAG pipeline over 100+ docs via pgvector · live Rust/Anchor compilation sandbox
1,100+ exercises completed in production, zero bugs
Built 4+ full-stack structural design modules using React, Django, and REST APIs
Developed 2 steel design modules from scratch based on IS 800:2007 with 15+ validation checks
Resolved critical CAD generation and session workflow bugs across 7+ modules
Reduced debugging time by 60%+ through logging, error isolation, and API refactoring
Built a session-based chat persistence layer handling 500+ daily conversations with no data loss.
Built a user feedback pipeline that collected 1,200+ ratings and drove a 15% improvement in model accuracy
Fixed critical bugs affecting 5,000+ users, pushing satisfaction scores from 3.5 to 4.2/5
Cut image load times by 20% by moving delivery to a CDN

projects.name: ScryCLI
projects.desc: AI-powered CLI like Claude Code and CodeX. It is a tool that allows you to use AI to write code and chat with it.

projects.name: xAI-Frontend
projects.desc: X.AI hero section in ReactJS with that smoke effect using Unicornstudio

awards.title: Colosseum Codex Feature
awards.desc: Highlighted in official Solana newsletter for developer education impact.
